Localization.Description: An SQL command was executed. This may indicate a reconnaissance attack in the internal structure of the Apache Cassandra database.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to obtain information about Apache Cassandra database roles on host {dst.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to obtain information about Apache Cassandra database users on host {dst.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to obtain information about Apache Cassandra database permissions on host {dst.host}
User {subject.application.account.name} executed an SQL command to obtain general information about the Apache Cassandra database on host {dst.host}
